shell.description: MoolaHub brings together personal savings goals and traditional group circles with modern fintech and blockchain technology. Save consistently, earn yield on your money, and belong to a community that grows wealth together.

features.receipt: Every transaction has an on-chain receipt
features.circles: Save in circles with people you trust

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep your savings on track.
login.resetDone: Your password has been reset. Sign in with your new password.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Save smarter, together. It only takes a minute.

complete.title: Finish setting up
complete.subtitle: A couple more details secure your account so you can always sign in with your email.
